app.title: GAME CENTER
app.subtitle: Select a game (long press for description)
app.exitConfirm: Do you want to exit Game Center?

common.hintWatchAdFull:
Watch an ad to get a hint?

※ Please watch the ad to the end.

tetris.name: Tetris
tetris.subtitle: Tetris
tetris.description: Rotate and place falling blocks to complete horizontal lines. Game over when blocks reach the top!
tetris.objectiveDesc:
Place falling blocks to complete horizontal lines.
Completed lines disappear and you earn points.
tetris.controlsDesc:
• ←→ : Move block left/right
• ↓ : Move block down faster
• Rotate button : Rotate block 90°
• Drop button : Drop block instantly
tetris.scoringDesc:
• 1 line: 100 points
• 2 lines: 300 points
• 3 lines: 500 points
• 4 lines (Tetris): 800 points
tetris.gameOverDesc: The game ends when blocks reach the ceiling.

tetrisWide.name: Block Crush
tetrisWide.subtitle: Block Crush
tetrisWide.description: Clear all initial blocks on a wide board by completing lines!
tetrisWide.objectiveDesc:
Place falling blocks on a board pre-filled with initial blocks to complete horizontal lines.
Completed lines disappear. Clear all initial blocks (gray) to complete the level.
tetrisWide.controlsDesc:
• ←→ : Move block left/right
• ↓ : Move block down faster
• Rotate button : Rotate block 90°
• Drop button : Drop block instantly
tetrisWide.scoringDesc:
• 1 line: 100 points
• 2 lines: 300 points
• 3 lines: 500 points
• 4 lines (Tetris): 800 points
tetrisWide.gameOverDesc: The game ends when blocks reach the ceiling.

gomoku.name: Gomoku
gomoku.subtitle: Five in a Row
gomoku.description: Black and white take turns placing stones. First to get 5 in a row horizontally, vertically, or diagonally wins.
gomoku.rulesObjectiveDesc:
Be the first to place 5 stones in a row
horizontally, vertically, or diagonally!
gomoku.rulesHowToPlayDesc:
• Black plays first
• Take turns placing stones on empty spaces
• Stones cannot be moved once placed
gomoku.rulesForbiddenDesc:
• Double-three: Creating two open threes at once
• Double-four: Creating two fours at once
• Overline: Placing 6 or more stones in a row
gomoku.rulesTipsDesc:
Create an open four (unblocked on both ends)
and your opponent cannot defend!

othello.name: Othello
othello.subtitle: Reversi
othello.description: Flip opponent's pieces by sandwiching them. The player with more pieces when the board is full wins.
othello.rulesObjectiveDesc:
Have more discs than your opponent
when the game ends to win!
othello.rulesHowToPlayDesc:
• Black plays first
• Place discs to sandwich opponent's discs
  between your own to flip them
• Pass if you have no valid moves
othello.rulesFlippingDesc:
• Flip horizontally, vertically, or diagonally
• Multiple directions can be flipped at once
• You must flip at least one disc to place
othello.rulesTipsDesc:
• Corners cannot be flipped once captured
• Edges are also advantageous positions
• Flipping fewer discs early can be beneficial

janggi.name: Janggi
janggi.subtitle: Korean Chess
janggi.description: Traditional Korean board game. Capture the opponent's general to win.
janggi.rulesObjectiveDesc:
Checkmate the opponent's General (King) to win!
(When the General cannot escape from check)
janggi.rulesPieceMovementDesc:
• General: 1 space within the palace
• Chariot: Unlimited horizontal/vertical
• Cannon: Jumps over pieces to move/capture
• Horse: 1 space + 1 diagonal
• Elephant: 1 space + 2 diagonal
• Guard: 1 space within the palace
• Soldier: 1 space forward/left/right
janggi.rulesSpecialDesc:
• Check: Attacking the opponent's General
• Checkmate: General cannot escape check
• Bikjang: When Generals face each other directly
• Cannon cannot jump over or capture another Cannon
janggi.rulesTipsDesc:
• The Chariot is the most powerful piece
• Cannon needs another piece to jump over
• Horse and Elephant are blocked by pieces in their path
janggi.blockedMoveDesc: Moving here would put your king in check. This move is not allowed.
janggi.geminiApiDesc: Enter Gemini API key to play against a smarter AI.
janggi.geminiApiGuide:
You can get a free API key from Google AI Studio:
https://aistudio.google.com/apikey

solitaire.name: Solitaire
solitaire.subtitle: Klondike
solitaire.description: Classic Klondike Solitaire. Stack all cards by suit from Ace to King to win.
solitaire.rulesObjectiveDesc:
Stack all cards on the 4 foundation piles
by suit from Ace to King!
solitaire.rulesHowToPlayDesc:
• Tableau: Stack in descending order, alternating red/black
• Foundation: Stack by suit in ascending order
• Tap the deck to draw new cards
• Only Kings can be placed on empty tableau spaces
solitaire.rulesCardMoveDesc:
• Drag face-up cards to move them
• Move multiple cards at once
• Double-tap for auto-move to foundation
solitaire.rulesTipsDesc:
• Move Aces to foundation immediately
• Prioritize revealing face-down cards
• Use Draw 1/Draw 3 mode to adjust difficulty

minesweeper.name: Minesweeper
minesweeper.subtitle: Minesweeper
minesweeper.description: Use number hints to reveal all safe cells. Step on a mine and it's game over!
minesweeper.rulesObjectiveDesc:
Reveal all cells without mines to win!
Step on a mine and it's game over!
minesweeper.rulesControlsDesc:
• Tap: Reveal cell
• Long press: Place/remove flag
• Long press on number: Reveal surrounding cells
minesweeper.rulesNumbersDesc:
Numbers indicate how many mines
are in the surrounding 8 cells.
Example: "3" means 3 nearby mines
minesweeper.rulesTipsDesc:
• First click is never a mine
• Use flags to mark mine locations
• Use hints when you're stuck

baseball.name: Number Baseball
baseball.subtitle: Bulls and Cows
baseball.description: Guess the hidden number using strike and ball hints.
baseball.rulesObjectiveDesc:
Guess the 3-digit number chosen by the computer!
Each digit is unique, from 0 to 9.
baseball.rulesStrikeBallDesc:
• Strike (S): Correct digit in correct position
• Ball (B): Correct digit in wrong position
• Out: No matching digits
baseball.rulesTipsDesc:
• Use ball hints to find the correct digits first
• Then try different positions for those digits
• Use hints for extra help

onecard.name: One Card
onecard.subtitle: Crazy Eights
onecard.description: Play cards one at a time. First to empty their hand wins.
onecard.rulesObjectiveDesc:
Be the first to discard all your cards!
You must say "One Card" when you have one card left.
onecard.rulesHowToPlayDesc:
• Play a card with the same number or suit
• Draw one card from the deck if you can't play
• Turns proceed counter-clockwise
onecard.rulesAttackCardsDesc:
• 2: Draw +2 cards (stackable)
• A: Draw +3 cards (♠A is +5)
• Black Joker: Draw +5 cards
• Color Joker: Draw +7 cards (unblockable)
onecard.rulesDefenseDesc:
• Against 2 → Defend with 2, same-suit A, or Joker
• Against A → Defend with A or Joker
• Against Black Joker → Only Color Joker
• Against Color Joker → Cannot defend!
• Defense stacks the attack to the next player
onecard.rulesSpecialCardsDesc:
• 7: Change suit
• J: Skip next player
• Q: Reverse direction
• K: Skip 2 consecutive turns
onecard.rulesTipsDesc:
• Defend attacks with equal or stronger attack cards
• Use Jokers wisely - they're powerful
• Missing "One Card" on your last card results in a penalty!

yutnori.name: Yutnori
yutnori.subtitle: Korean Board Game
yutnori.description: Traditional Korean board game. Throw yut sticks and move all your pieces to the goal to win.
yutnori.rulesObjectiveDesc: Be the first to move all 4 pieces to the goal!
yutnori.rulesYutResultsDesc:
• Do: Move 1 space
• Gae: Move 2 spaces
• Geol: Move 3 spaces
• Yut: Move 4 spaces + throw again
• Mo: Move 5 spaces + throw again
• Back Do: Move 1 space backward (-1)
yutnori.rulesSpecialDesc:
• Stop at corners to take shortcuts
• Capture opponent's piece to throw again
• Stack your pieces (move together)
• If stacked pieces are captured, all go back
yutnori.rulesTipsDesc:
• Use corner shortcuts actively
• Stack pieces for safety
• Capture opponents for extra turns!

hula.name: Hula
hula.subtitle: Hwatu Card Game
hula.description: Korean flower card game. Combine cards and be the first to play all your cards to win.
hula.rulesObjectiveDesc:
Minimize your hand's card points to win.
Play all 7 cards at once for "Hula"!
hula.rulesProgressDesc:
1. Draw 1 card from deck
2. Register melds (Run, Group, 7) or attach
3. Discard 1 card
• Play counterclockwise
hula.rulesMeldTypesDesc:
• Run: 3+ consecutive same suit
  (e.g., ♠3-♠4-♠5)
• Group: 3-4 same numbers
  (e.g., ♠5-♥5-♦5)
hula.rulesSevenDesc:
• 7 can be registered alone!
• Can also be part of Run/Group
• After solo registration, only extend as Run
  (attach same suit 6 or 8)
hula.rulesThankYouMeldDesc:
• Thank You: Take discarded card and register immediately
• Attach: Only if you have melds
  (can add to own or opponent's melds)
hula.rulesStopDesc:
• Can declare Stop anytime
• Player with lowest hand points wins on Stop
• Advantageous when you have few cards!
hula.rulesScoringDesc:
• A = 1 point
• 2-9 = face value
• J = 10, Q = 11, K = 12 points
hula.thankYouAttachToComputer: Thank you! Attached {card} to COM{num}'s meld!

sudoku.name: Sudoku
sudoku.subtitle: Sudoku
sudoku.description: Fill the 9x9 grid with numbers 1-9. Each row, column, and 3x3 box must contain no duplicates.
sudoku.quickInputGuide: Number {num} selected - Tap cell to input
sudoku.quickInputNoteGuide: Number {num} selected - Tap cell for note
sudoku.eraseMode: Erase mode - Tap cell to erase
sudoku.tapCellToEdit: Tap a cell to open the edit screen
sudoku.rulesObjectiveDesc: Fill all empty cells in the 9x9 grid with numbers 1-9!
sudoku.rulesBasicDesc:
• Each row must have 1-9 exactly once
• Each column must have 1-9 exactly once
• Each 3x3 box must have 1-9 exactly once
sudoku.rulesControlsDesc:
• Tap empty cell → Input via number pad
• Quick Input: Select number first → Tap cell
• Notes: Record candidate numbers small
• Quick+Notes: Tap cell to add note
sudoku.rulesTipsDesc:
• Start with certain numbers
• Use Fill Notes for auto candidates
• Failure count is recorded
sudoku.samuraiRulesBasicDesc:
• Same rules as regular Sudoku
• Each 9x9 board has 1-9 once
• Row, column, 3x3 box rules apply
sudoku.samuraiRulesOverlapDesc:
• Center board overlaps with 4 corner boards
• Numbers in overlapping areas must be valid for both boards
• Use overlaps to get hints
sudoku.samuraiRulesTipsDesc:
• Start from overlapping areas
• If stuck on one board, check others
• Pinch to zoom for better view
sudoku.killerRulesObjectiveDesc: Regular Sudoku rules + Cage sum conditions!
sudoku.killerRulesBasicDesc:
• Numbers in each cage must sum to the target
• No duplicate numbers within the same cage
• Regular Sudoku rules also apply
sudoku.killerRulesCageDesc:
• Dotted areas are cages
• Small number in top-left is the sum
• Example: Sum 6 cage with 2 cells → 1+5, 2+4
sudoku.killerRulesTipsDesc:
• Start with smaller cages
• Combine cage sums with regular rules
• Single-cell cage = that exact number!

numberSums.name: Number Sums
numberSums.subtitle: Number Sums
numberSums.description: Fill in the blanks using the sum hints for rows and columns.
numberSums.rulesObjectiveDesc: Use the row and column sum hints to fill in the blanks!
numberSums.rulesBasicDesc:
• Each row contains 1 to N once (N = board size)
• Each column contains 1 to N once
• No duplicate numbers allowed
numberSums.rulesSumHintsDesc:
• Numbers at the end of rows/columns are sum hints
• They indicate the sum of specific cells in that row/column
• Cells without hints are not included in the sum
numberSums.rulesTipsDesc:
• Start with smaller sums
• Use both row and column hints together
• Use elimination to narrow down possible numbers

mole.name: Whack-a-Mole
mole.subtitle: Tap the moles!
mole.description: Catch as many moles as you can in 30 seconds!
mole.rulesObjectiveDesc: Catch as many moles as you can in 30 seconds!
mole.rulesControlsDesc:
• Tap quickly when a mole appears
• Moles will hide again after a moment
mole.rulesScoringDesc:
• 10 points per mole
• The faster you tap, the more you can catch
mole.rulesTipsDesc:
• Watch the entire screen
• Learn the mole patterns
• Keep your finger close to the screen

bubble.name: Bubble Shooter
bubble.subtitle: Match 3 same color bubbles!
bubble.description: Connect 3 or more same color bubbles to pop them!
bubble.rulesObjectiveDesc: Connect 3 or more same color bubbles to clear them all!
bubble.rulesControlsDesc:
• Touch the screen to aim
• Release to shoot the bubble
• Or tap the shoot button
bubble.rulesScoringDesc:
• 3 bubbles matched: base points
• More matches = higher score
• Falling bubbles give bonus points
bubble.rulesTipsDesc:
• Use walls to bounce shots
• Clear top bubbles to drop those below
• Game over if bubbles reach the bottom!
bubble.hintMessage:
Watch an ad to always display the bubble's trajectory.
(Lasts until game over)

marbleSort.name: Marble Sort
marbleSort.subtitle: Sort marbles into baskets!
marbleSort.description: Drop marbles from the rail into matching color baskets! Timing is key.
marbleSort.extraLifeMessage: Watch an ad to get an extra life.

dialog.savedGameMessage:
You have a saved game.
Would you like to continue?
dialog.undoMessage: Watch an ad to use undo?
dialog.hintMessage: Watch an ad to use hint?
dialog.fillNotesMessage: Watch an ad to fill all notes?
dialog.hintModeMessage: Watch an ad to use hint mode?
dialog.reviveMessage: Watch an ad to continue the game.
